nasb.text: Since now the Lord, the God of Israel, drove out the Amorites from before His people Israel, are you then to possess it?

esv.text: So then the Lord, the God of Israel, dispossessed the Amorites from before his people Israel; and are you to take possession of them?

cnv.text: 現在耶和華以色列的　神，已經把亞摩利人從他的子民以色列人面前趕走了，你竟要佔有這地嗎？

ccb.text: 既然是以色列的上帝耶和华为祂的以色列子民赶走了亚摩利人，你凭什么要夺取这块土地？
